name: terraform-state-mover
description: Analyze cross-repository Terraform HCL files, detect hardcoded ARN dependencies, and generate migration plans

scripts.demo:gatekeeper: tsx src/cli.ts analyze examples/gatekeeper/infra-central examples/gatekeeper/service-app-api examples/gatekeeper/service-app-analytics examples/gatekeeper/infra-platform --preset gatekeeper --state-dir examples/gatekeeper/state -o output/gatekeeper && tsx src/cli.ts migrate examples/gatekeeper/infra-central examples/gatekeeper/service-app-api examples/gatekeeper/service-app-analytics examples/gatekeeper/infra-platform --preset gatekeeper --state-dir examples/gatekeeper/state -o output/gatekeeper --validate
scripts.demo:gatekeeper-large: tsx src/cli.ts analyze examples/gatekeeper-large/infra-central examples/gatekeeper-large/service-orders examples/gatekeeper-large/service-payments examples/gatekeeper-large/service-auth examples/gatekeeper-large/service-analytics examples/gatekeeper-large/service-notifications examples/gatekeeper-large/service-search --preset gatekeeper --state-dir examples/gatekeeper-large/state -o output/gatekeeper-large && tsx src/cli.ts migrate examples/gatekeeper-large/infra-central examples/gatekeeper-large/service-orders examples/gatekeeper-large/service-payments examples/gatekeeper-large/service-auth examples/gatekeeper-large/service-analytics examples/gatekeeper-large/service-notifications examples/gatekeeper-large/service-search --preset gatekeeper --state-dir examples/gatekeeper-large/state -o output/gatekeeper-large --validate
scripts.demo:terralith: tsx src/cli.ts analyze examples/terralith/monolith --preset terralith -o output/terralith && tsx src/cli.ts migrate examples/terralith/monolith --preset terralith -o output/terralith --validate
scripts.demo:spaghetti: tsx src/cli.ts analyze examples/spaghetti/network examples/spaghetti/platform examples/spaghetti/services --preset spaghetti --state-dir examples/spaghetti/state -o output/spaghetti && tsx src/cli.ts migrate examples/spaghetti/network examples/spaghetti/platform examples/spaghetti/services --preset spaghetti --state-dir examples/spaghetti/state -o output/spaghetti --validate
scripts.demo:cross-account: tsx src/cli.ts analyze examples/cross-account/multi-account --preset cross-account -o output/cross-account && tsx src/cli.ts migrate examples/cross-account/multi-account --preset cross-account -o output/cross-account --validate
scripts.demo:data-layer: tsx src/cli.ts analyze examples/data-layer/monolith --preset data-layer -o output/data-layer && tsx src/cli.ts migrate examples/data-layer/monolith --preset data-layer -o output/data-layer --validate
scripts.demo:env-copypasta: tsx src/cli.ts analyze examples/env-copypasta/prod examples/env-copypasta/stg examples/env-copypasta/dev -o output/env-copypasta
scripts.demo:crossplane: tsx src/cli.ts analyze examples/crossplane/infra-central examples/crossplane/crossplane-config --include-crossplane --preset gatekeeper --state-dir examples/crossplane/state -o output/crossplane
scripts.demo: pnpm demo:gatekeeper && pnpm demo:gatekeeper-large && pnpm demo:terralith && pnpm demo:spaghetti && pnpm demo:cross-account && pnpm demo:data-layer && pnpm demo:god-module && pnpm demo:env-copypasta && pnpm demo:count-antipattern && pnpm demo:depends-on-module && pnpm demo:crossplane && echo 'All demos generated in output/'
